accounts.latestUpdate: 100+ existing PCS licenses on R2021x; upgrade/migration to R2026x pending proposal submission on Mr. Rao's return from abroad.

sessions.notes: 100+ existing PCS licenses on ENOVIA R2021x; active user base ~55 currently using project management, change management, and BOM. | System was dormant for a significant period; EDS now pushing for upgrade to R2026x. | Engagement is primarily an upgrade/migration case — old trigrams cease, new R2026x trigrams to be applied; upsell potential exists in certain modules but is not the immediate focus. | EDS to showcase unified data model advantages of 3DEXPERIENCE R2026x as upgrade rationale. | Decision-maker (Mr. Rao) is currently abroad; proposal to be submitted on his return. | Customer expected to restrict initial scope to 55–56 active users for project execution needs.
